notes: Web layer of the CREFLE design system (26 components). Bundle = styles.css closure (foundation tokens + web-tokens + themes + fonts) + guidelines + self-contained @dsCard reference cards (colors/type/components/OnMyFactory dashboard). Separate from 'CREFLE Foundation' (foundation only) and 'CREFLE Presentation Design System' (slides). Live interactive components: Storybook (npm run storybook). Re-sync: rebuild ds-bundle, arm _ds_needs_recompile, finalize_plan(writes=ds-bundle paths) -> write_files.
